title: Failing Forward: Improving Generative Error Correction for ASR with Synthetic Data and Retrieval Augmentation
research_areas: T24 Speech Resources and Processing (including Phonetic Databases, Phonology, Prosody, Speech Recognition, Synthesis and Spoken Language Understanding)
T29 NLP for education, Automated essay scoring and feedback generation, grammatical error correction and detection, intelligent tutoring systems
T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
